_comment: Human corrections layered on top of lexeme.seed.json (the PDF-extracted base). Regenerated by `npm run export:overrides` (or the reviewer portal) from the DB-vs-base diff; edit via the reviewer portal, not by hand. Applied after the base on every seed, so corrections survive reseeds and reproduce in any fresh DB. edits = sparse per-lemma field patches (field-level); adds = new records; deletes = removed base lemmas.
